segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Where is Captain Allison going, and how?

translations.zh-Hans: 艾利森船长要去哪里？他将怎样去？

segments.text: Our neighbor, Charles Allison, will sail from Portsmouth tomorrow.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们的邻居查尔斯·艾利森明天将从朴次茅斯启航。

segments.text: We'll meet him at the harbor early in the morning.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们一早会到港口为他送行。

segments.text: He will be in his small boat, Topsail.

translations.zh-Hans: 他将乘坐自己的小船“涛波赛尔号”。

segments.text: Topsail is a famous little boat.

translations.zh-Hans: “涛波赛尔号”是一艘著名的小船。

segments.text: It has sailed across the Atlantic many times.

translations.zh-Hans: 它已经多次横渡大西洋。

segments.text: Allison will set out at eight o'clock, so we'll have plenty of time.

translations.zh-Hans: 艾利森将在8点钟出发，因此我们有充足的时间。

segments.text: We'll see his boat, and then we'll say goodbye to him.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们会参观他的船，然后向他告别。

segments.text: He will be away for two months.
We are very proud of him.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们为他感到非常自豪。

segments.text: He will take part in an important race across the Atlantic.

translations.zh-Hans: 他将参加一场重要的横渡大西洋比赛。
